# phare_projects (Data Source)

Fetches a list of projects. Requires an organization-scoped API key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "phare_projects" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) List of projects (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (Number) Project ID
- `members` (List of Number) List of team member IDs
- `name` (String) Project name
- `settings` (Attributes) Project settings (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects--settings))
- `slug` (String) Project slug
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp

<a id="nestedatt--projects--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects.settings`

Read-Only:

- `incident_merging_time_window` (Number) Time window for merging in minutes
- `use_incident_ai` (Boolean) Whether AI summaries are enabled
- `use_incident_merging` (Boolean) Whether incident merging is enabled
